creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jov from comment #3)
There appear to be some newer sources available here, for instance:

http://grepcode.com/snapshot/repo1.maven.org/maven2/net.sf.flexjson/flexjson/3.3/

This update needs some more work -- change to a different MASTERSITE, unpack the sources from a .jar file, account for the new dependencies on junit and slf4j-{api,simple} (junit is probably just a TEST_DEPENDS). Oh, and version 3.3 is available too.
- Matthew@
https://reviews.freebsd.org/D11258
